name: ai-agent-toolkit
description: Source-first AI-agent toolkit with native Codex plugin metadata, English setup routing, Windows-safe hook repair, opt-in repo auto-update, and local bridge adapters.

interface.shortDescription: Source-first reusable agent skills with opt-in local bridge adapters
interface.longDescription: Use AI Agent Toolkit for reusable source-traceable skills, repo-local agent rules, validation guidance, English setup routing, opt-in repo-backed updates, and local OpenCode or Antigravity 2 bridge adapters. Codex updates this package natively and never installs or updates Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Audit the local Toolkit bridge state.
